assertions.description: SharedWorker can be constructed from a same-origin blob: script URL.
assertions.test: (()=>{try{const url=URL.createObjectURL(new Blob(['onconnect=e=>{}'],{type:'text/javascript'}));const w=new SharedWorker(url,{name:'cps-controller-'+Math.random()});const ok=w.port instanceof MessagePort;w.port.close();URL.revokeObjectURL(url);return ok;}catch(e){return false;}})()

assertions.description: Blob URLs created by the page serialize with the current origin, making them eligible worker scripts.
navigator.serviceWorker.controller is the nullable active controller that blob SharedWorkers now inherit.
ServiceWorkerContainer.register is available to install the controlling worker.
ServiceWorkerRegistration.scope identifies the client scope a controlled blob worker inherits from.
